formula_or_rule: Step 1 - MELD = 3.78*ln(bilirubin_mg_dl) + 11.2*ln(INR) + 9.57*ln(creatinine_mg_dl) + 6.43. Bilirubin, INR, and creatinine are each floored at 1.0 if below 1.0; creatinine is capped at 4.0 (and set to 4.0 if the patient has had dialysis >= twice in the past week). Step 2 - if MELD > 11: MELD_Na = MELD + 1.32*(137 - Na) - (0.033*MELD*(137 - Na)); otherwise MELD_Na = MELD. Na is bounded to [125, 137] mEq/L before use. Final MELD_Na is bounded to [6, 40] and rounded to the nearest integer.

condition_rules.creatinine_floor_and_cap: minimum 1.0, maximum 4.0 (set to 4.0 if on dialysis >=2x in past week)
condition_rules.sodium_bounds: clamp to [125, 137] before applying MELD-Na adjustment
